title: i18n 漏网全收 t()（补 2026-06-10 C5 遗漏）
description: Route remaining hardcoded English through t() with BOTH en + zh-CN keys: preflight 5+ throw new Error strings, validate 'Validation passed'/'Validation failed: N error(s)'/'  - {error}', and guidance 'More: docs/surfaces.md…' (guidance.stage.ts:65). Run the i18n completeness gate so neither locale has missing keys. This closes the C5 i18n-unification leak.
action: In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/preflight.stage.ts route the 5+ hardcoded-English `throw new Error("…")` (the throws at ~lines 75/84/92/108/117/128 — all EXCEPT the already-localized :67 target-invalid) through t() with new keys e.g. t('cli.install.preflight.error.<case>'); add matching en + zh-CN entries. In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/validate.stage.ts add keys t('cli.install.validate.passed') (or the checklist key shared with TASK-003), t('cli.install.validate.failed', {count}), t('cli.install.validate.failed.item', {error}) replacing the literals at lines 75/77/79. In packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/guidance.stage.ts (line 65) replace the literal 'More: docs/surfaces.md…' with t('cli.install.guidance.more'). Add ALL new keys to BOTH packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts and packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts (verified: this is where existing cli.install.* keys live; there is NO packages/cli/src/shared/i18n/locales/ path). Then run the i18n test suite.

criteria: grep -nE 'throw new Error\("' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/preflight.stage.ts returns 0 matches for user-visible messages (all routed through t(); only :67-style already-localized remain via t())
grep -n 'Validation passed' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/validate.stage.ts returns 0 matches (replaced by t())
grep -n 'More: docs/surfaces.md' packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/guidance.stage.ts returns 0 matches (replaced by t('cli.install.guidance.more'))
every new t() key added in this task exists in BOTH the en and zh-CN locale files (diff the key sets — no key present in one locale and missing in the other)
[runtime] pnpm test -- i18n passes (i18n.test.ts covers key completeness; no missing-key for the new cli.install.preflight.error.* / validate.* / guidance.more keys in either locale)
convergence.verification: cd packages/cli && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm test -- i18n
convergence.definition_of_done: preflight 用户可见 throw、validate 两/三串、guidance surfaces.md 行全部走 t() 且 en+zh-CN 双 locale 完整,i18n 完整性 gate 通过。

files.change: Route user-visible messages through t() with new keys

implementation: Locate the locale files the existing cli.install.* keys live in (i18n.ts import) — add new keys there
Replace preflight user-visible throw literals (all except already-localized) with t() + new keys
Replace validate literals (75/77/79) with t() passed/failed/item keys
Replace guidance line 65 literal with t('cli.install.guidance.more')
Add every new key to BOTH en and zh-CN locale files
Run tsc + i18n tests + the i18n completeness gate; fix any missing-key warnings

reference.pattern: Existing cli.install.* t() keys (e.g. cli.install.pipeline.*) and the :67 target-invalid throw already using t() in preflight

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure i18n leak-closure: 2026-06-10 C5 mandated all interactive text via t(); these are the leftovers. Mechanical route-through with both locales + gate.
decision_factors: zh-CN session showing raw English is jarring
rationale.tradeoffs: None material — coordinate validate keys with TASK-003 to avoid duplicate key definitions (both touch validate copy).

risks.risk: R14: i18n new-key leak in one locale -> runtime missing-key
risks.mitigation: add en + zh-CN in lockstep; run i18n completeness gate

risks.risk: validate.stage keys overlap with TASK-003 checklist keys
risks.mitigation: use a single shared key namespace cli.install.validate.* and coordinate so both tasks reference the same keys
